professions.title: Data Pipeline Engineer
professions.description: Data pipeline engineers design and maintain the flows that move data from source systems into enterprise stores. In the llamaverse, this frequently means building harmonisation pipelines from raw telemetry — particularly the movement batch files generated by the national llama tracking network — into curated content collections. Practitioners are expected to have strong opinions about transaction isolation, trigger behaviour, and the appropriate use of update vs node-update permissions.
professions.secretPowerAdvantage: Seer of Stars — anticipates downstream data quality issues
